# virtualbox_vm_ip_address (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `vm_id` (String) UUID of the virtual machine.

### Read-Only

- `ip_address` (String) Storage attachment identifier in the form `<vm_id>/<controller_name>/<port>/<device>`.
- `last_updated` (String)
